title: indigofera linifolia subsp. campbellii
intro: Indigofera linifolia subsp. campbellii, also known as a shrub or small tree, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Indigofera linifolia subsp. campbellii include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antiviral agent. In herbal preparations, the leaves or roots of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
